programme.title: Rock The Kasbah
programme.desc: ROCK THE KASBAH is the story of 'Richie Vance,' a has-been rock manager who takes his last remaining client on a USO tour of Afghanistan. When Richie finds himself in Kabul, abandoned, penniless and without his passport, he discovers a young girl with an extraordinary voice and manages her through Afghanistan's version of 'American Idol', the wildly popular 'Afghan Star'.

programme.title: Little Black Book
programme.desc: A young woman's life begins to resemble the daytime TV talk show she works for after she is persuaded to snoop through her boyfriend's Palm Pilot and discovers more than she wants to know about his past - and present.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Little Man
programme.desc: A short, baby-faced jewel thief masquerades as a baby to try to recover a stolen diamond.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: The Interview
programme.desc: Story revolves around a handsome talk show host and his producer who find themselves in way over their heads when they get involved in a plot to assassinate the prime minister of North Korea.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: After eating from the Tree of Knowledge, a primitive villager/slacker flees his people and encounters murderous Cain, slave traders, charismatic nutcase Abraham, and finally the city of Sodom. There the man falls for a princess, is hailed as "the chosen" by the oppressed people and ultimately leads a revolt that topples the government and frees the slaves. He heads off with the princess to visit Egypt....

programme.title: Ricki And The Flash
programme.desc: A woman abandons her family when she is younger to find fame and fortune as a rock star. Decades later, she decides to be a mother again to her estranged children, one of whom is going through a rough divorce.

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Much to the horror of his upwardly mobile wife, a New York City cop makes good on his promise to split his lottery winnings with a waitress in this delightful comedy. Money changes everything, and all three lives are transformed in this charming comedy.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.
